judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on three visual elements: two photographs of a circular object in a grainy sky and one diagram/sketch, with Description B adding specific caption details omitted by Description A without contradiction.
original_image_tags: * Top-left black-and-white photograph of a grainy sky with a faint, circular object circled in dark ink.
* Bottom-left black-and-white photograph of a grainy sky with a faint, circular object circled in dark ink.

gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A newspaper page in Spanish with two grainy black-and-white photographs of a small circular object in the sky, each marked with a hand-drawn circle, plus a chalkboard-style diagram of a layered disc-shaped object labeled “3° Plano,” “2° Plano,” “1° Plano,” and “3° Plano” with arrows and dashed construction lines.*
